name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, disorganized document management causes delayed claims processing. We automate document tracking and filing instead of manual filing and tracking of documents.
problem_solved: Delayed claims processing due to disorganized document management.
